title: Pipe
description: Pipe: A constant circular cross section surface, following a defined curve path.

Radius.description: The distance from the Curve Centreline to a point on the Pipe surface. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Capped.description: Defines the Pipe as closed and therfore a solid volume.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
